text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Rrrrring!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
My alarm goes off, signaling the start<n>of a new
day.
choice_data_list:
Time for another great day of training with my
trainee!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After getting everything ready, I set<n>off for the
training track.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Tracen is holding scrimmages today,<n>and the
track is full of Umamusume<n>running around to
warm up before the<n>races.
choice_data_list:
Everyone's working so hard to fulfill their
dreams...

Everyone's working so hard to fulfill their
dreams...

text_block_list.text: I couldn't have put it better myself! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
This is truly a treasure trove of talent!<n>
Umamusume worth treating, as far as<n>the eye
can see! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! ♪ Now who shall I start with?
choice_data_list: Tazunaaa! This lady's acting suspicious!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, what?! Hold up! I'm an ally to<n>all
Umamusume! I swear, my sharp<n>needles can
boost their powers to<n>fearsome—
choice_data_list: I knew you were dangerous!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on, I'm not dangerous at all!<n>Why, as a
result of my intensive<n>training, I've even
massively<n>improved the speed I can roll up hand<n>
towels!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hrnnngh... All right, how about this—let<n>me give
you a demonstration! I'll<n>show you just how
safe my<n>treatment is and blow all your worries<n>
away!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Look, I'll even control my urge to<n>poke people
until you give me your<n>seal of approval, okay?
Please?!
choice_data_list: Fine! Show me your worst!
I suppose I can see how things go...
I think I'll pass!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Yesss! ♪ Now with that out of the<n>way, let's bring
you closer to being an<n>Umamusume! ☆
choice_data_list: Closer to being... an Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What're you staring at me all<n>dumbfounded
for?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
My acupuncture is for Umamusume,<n>so I need
testimonials from subjects<n>as close to the target
demographic as<n>I can get.
choice_data_list: But isn't that like... asking for the impossible?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Nonsense! To become like an<n>Umamusume, all
you have to do is<n>train like one! Probably! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Let's get going, Trainer... Or rather,<n><username>!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
If it's speed you want, an exercise<n>bike is
everything you need! Go, go,<n>gooo!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Faster, faster! Let me see you up that<n>cadence!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Next on the list is backstroke! Swim<n>until all your
limbs go numb! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Yup, yup! That's it—keep up the good<n>form! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Finally, we gotta work on your abs to<n>increase
your overall strength! One,<n>two, three, four! Don't
you worry<n>anymore!
choice_data_list: (M-my body feels like it's about to give out...)

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Don't give up! Why? Because<n>you're not
training alone!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Believe in the power of your<n>friendship... with me!
choice_data_list: F-friendship?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I have no idea what she's saying, but<n>it's
certainly reassuring to know I'm<n>not alone in
this.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
This is just like the training I did<n>before with
<chrname>...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Wow, wow, wow! What a great<n>success, if I do
say so myself! ☆ Now<n>that's what I call
friendship training! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Good job! ☆ Looks like your training<n>has paid
dividends! ♪
choice_data_list: Um... So why are we at the infirmary?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh c'mon, don't play dumb! We're<n>finally able to
get to the main event<n>now!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Now that you're done with training...<n>let me give
you a little poke! ♪
choice_data_list: I-I'm not mentally prepared for this!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Relax, relaaax! It'll be quick and<n>painless, so
don't you worry! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Annnd poke!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: ...Strangely enough, my body feels<n>much lighter!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Wait, that expression on your face...<n>You're
kidding... It actually worked?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: I did it! I knew I was a genius! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna keep this up and perform<n>even more
successful treatments! You<n>do your best in
becoming an<n>Umamusume too, 'kay? ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well?! Didn't that needle pin you right<n>where you
needed it? Do you feel it<n>working its magic deep
down?!
choice_data_list: I feel pins and needles, all right... Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! No way—are you telling meit worked too well?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Well, there's always next<n>time! Shrug it
off! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
You might be unable to move for a<n>while, but get
well soon! Anyway, see<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Since I can't do anything but lie there,<n>I use the
time to go over the training<n>plan I have in mind for
<chrname>.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Yesss! ♪ Now with that out of the<n>way, let's bring
you closer to being an<n>Umamusume! ☆
choice_data_list: Closer to being... an Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What're you staring at me all<n>dumbfounded
for?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
My acupuncture is for Umamusume,<n>so I need
testimonials from subjects<n>as close to the target
demographic as<n>I can get.
choice_data_list: But isn't that like... asking for the impossible?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Nonsense! To become like an<n>Umamusume, all
you have to do is<n>train like one! Probably! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Now, as you yourself suggested,<n>let's try it out
and see how things<n>work out. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Let's get going, Trainer... Or rather,<n><username>!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Are you ready? Let's start off with a<n>turf sprint!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Not bad! Your speed is impressive! ♪<n>Though I'd
still easily outpace you if I<n>hightailed it! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Next on the menu is breaststroke!<n>Build up that
stamina now and it'll be<n>smooth sailing for you in
the future! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Your swimming style reminds me of<n>the way I
looked while frantically<n>searching for a needle I
dropped into a<n>pond.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Finally, we can't forget about training<n>your
strength! ♪ And that'll come<n>naturally by running
on dirt! Probably!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'll be here waiti—ack! When did all<n>this dirt get in
my heels?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well done! ☆ Looks like you worked<n>up a great
sweat! ♪
choice_data_list: Um... So why are we at the infirmary?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh c'mon, don't play dumb! We're<n>finally able to
get to the main event<n>now!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Now that you're done with training...<n>let me give
you a little poke! ♪
choice_data_list: I-I'm not mentally prepared for this!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Relax, relaaax! It'll be quick and<n>painless, so
don't you worry! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Annnd poke!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Somehow... I feel as though I'm<n>brimming with
power! However...
choice_data_list: I... I can't feel my fingertips...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hm, that's a worrying side effect!<n>Maybe this is
a sign that I still have<n>much to improve...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
This might have been the fault of my<n>
acupuncture, but it might have also<n>been because
I went too easy on your<n>training!
choice_data_list: I thought I got a good workout, though.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! We'll have to step up your<n>training a
couple notches for you to<n>become more like an
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
If the training you did today was, say,<n>level one...
I get the feeling we'll need<n>you to go all the way
up to level three!
choice_data_list: I-I'll do what I can...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ For my sake... No, for the<n>future of
acupuncture and<n>Umamusume, you must work
hard to<n>become an Umamusume yourself!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: You can do it, <username>! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? I didn't quite catch what you<n>said! Could
you repeat that?
choice_data_list:
I said I'll pass. You're asking way too much of
me!

I said I'll pass. You're asking way too much of
me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Without waiting for a reaction, I<n>quickly turn and
leave, but...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hold it right there, practice partner!<n>Where do you
think you're going?!
choice_data_list: She's chasing after me?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: You can't shake me off thateasily! They don't call me Ol'Stubborn Sasami for nothing!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: No worrieeees!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! ♪ Resistance is futile!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Surrender your body to me, the<n>legendary
acupuncturist Sasami<n>Anshinzawa! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Annnd poke!
choice_data_list: Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! Well? Do you feel<n>tremendous power
coursing through<n>your veins?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa, what? What's the matter?!
choice_data_list: Why's... everything spinning?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Oh... That's that, I guess...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, would you look at the time? I<n>should get
going! Bye! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Today I've learned the hard way to<n>never go
along with sketchy deals... I<n>vow to teach my
trainee the same<n>lesson during our next session.
